chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P N0.D-10 0f 2024 ٥3،٤ ٥٢٥٤٢ wth gniature 0f J٧dg٤ For orders on office objections For hearing of main case 21.03.2024 Mr Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr Ghulam Abbas Kber, AAG ٢ ٠ ٥ ٦٣nn ٦٣٠ ٦٠ Learned Counsel does not press this petition and submits that petitioner has already filed appea before Inspector General of Police, Sindh, who may be directed to decide the same in accordance with law Learned AAG undertakes if any appeal found pending before would be decided accordance WIth |٥٧ within IGP Sindh instant petition stands disposed of in reasonable time Accordingly the above terms
